_comment: Example ONLY — no secrets. Real secrets (BETA_AGENT_KEYRING/KEY_ID) are provisioned out-of-band and NEVER committed. Set these as service-scoped environment variables. NOTE: a machine env var is NOT a protected secret store — restrict it to the service account and rotate the key; DPAPI/Credential Manager retrieval is a follow-up. Do NOT provision the keyring until the post-approval first start.
_execution_model: B3P-2 per-slot pool. A runtime occupies a PRE-PROVISIONED slot: fixed non-admin identity, fixed directory, fixed launch/terminate tasks the agent may only TRIGGER. Run install_pool.ps1 BEFORE install_service.ps1 — the service install refuses to proceed until the pool exists.
_model_selection: slot_pool is EXPLICIT. Selecting it without the settings below is a STARTUP FAILURE, never a quiet fall back to the legacy uuid-directory layout. Omit BETA_AGENT_EXECUTION_MODEL entirely to get the B2 compatibility model.
_golden: All THREE golden values are required in slot_pool mode and an empty value is refused. GOLDEN_DIGEST is the tree digest recorded when the image was staged. GOLDEN_MANIFEST_VERSION is the contents of .guvfx_golden_manifest — left empty, the stage-copy pre-check would compare '' == '' and pass on an unversioned image.
_golden_dir_note: This is NOT the old C:\GuvFX\beta\golden default. The approved image was commissioned as a dedicated clean install at C:\GuvFX\golden\newMT5 (RULE 10) and validated + promoted on 2026-07-23 — see evidence/b3p2-install/golden_and_plan_2026-07-23.md. install_pool.ps1 must be run with -GoldenDir set to the SAME path, or the installer grants slot identities read access to one directory while the agent stages from another.
_approved_tasks: Written by install_pool.ps1. The launch gate asserts every installed launch task against these definitions before any trigger, so the agent REFUSES TO START without this file. Read-only to the service account: the agent must never rewrite its own approvals.
_slots_root: BETA_AGENT_SLOTS_ROOT is deliberately omitted. Slot paths are derived from the FIXED namespace in win_primitives, not from configuration; any other value is refused at startup rather than failing every operation with path_escape at runtime.
_drain: MUST exceed the 30s settle window (the bounded re-observation after an asynchronous task trigger) or startup is REFUSED. The old value of 20 predates the settle window and would guarantee that a service stop during a STOP force-kills the mutation mid-stage.
BETA_AGENT_KEYRING: << provisioned out-of-band at the post-approval first start: {"k1":"<hex-secret>"} >>
